mission.title: litellm: [Feature]: Improve import speed
mission.description: [Feature]: Improve import speed. Requested by 42+ users.

steps.title: Check current litellm deployment
steps.description:
Verify your litellm version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
helm list -n litellm 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working litellm installation.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### The Feature

Simply importing LiteLLM can take up to 1 second, which is rather slow.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Feature]: Improve import speed
steps.description:
I'm encountering the same issue. Import time seems to vary a lot, anywhere between 3 seconds to 20+ seconds (usually around 4). 
I've tried installing it on an NVME SSD, I'm wired to a fiber internet connection with low latency, and I still get pretty bad import times. 

Here's my test
```yaml
import time: self [us] | cumulative | imported package
...
import time:    353694 |    1098960 | litellm
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Feature]: Improve import speed" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I'm encountering the same issue. Import time seems to vary a lot, anywhere between 3 seconds to 20+ seconds (usually around 4). 
I've tried installing it on an NVME SSD, I'm wired to a fiber internet connection with low latency, and I still get pretty bad import times.
codeSnippets:
import time: self [us] | cumulative | imported package
...
import time:    353694 |    1098960 | litellm

uv run --python 3.10 --with litellm python -X importtime -c "import litellm"

import time: 20107192 | 20857950 | litellm

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
